text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Sigh, I'm at a loss. I don't know how to reply to Grandmother...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Where shall we go for our family vacation? I just
can't think of any good suggestions!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Hm... Well, we've recently been to Hong Kong,
Dubai, and the UK...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: The UK was fun. We could go there again.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
That won't do. As a Mejiro, I must not fall back on
past favorites!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I was appointed this task directly by
Grandmother. It is a trial that I must overcome!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: It is my duty to suggest a brand new destination that will surprise and delight her!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Or maybe she was just casually asking if there's
anywhere you'd like to go...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Haha. That's so you, McQueen. You do you!
